subject: Re: Issue with Software Download - Service Unavailable
body:
There we go, chatgpt is trying to download warp :)

On Sun, 24 Sept 2023, 02:27 杜有位, <duyouwei0626@gmail.com> wrote:

> Hello Developer,
>
> I hope this message finds you well. I recently attempted to download and
> utilize your software, which I believe is truly remarkable. However, I
> faced some challenges while trying to get it from the official website.
>
> Upon following the "Download" section instructions, I was presented with a
> "Service Unavailable" notification. The detailed message displayed was:
> "Service Unavailable HTTP Error 503. The service is unavailable."
>
> I'm reaching out to seek guidance on how to resolve this issue and to
> inquire if there's an alternative source from which I can download the
> software. I appreciate your attention to this matter and eagerly await your
> guidance.
>
> Thank you for your time and assistance.
>
> Best regards,
>
> GIBH—DYW
>
> --
> You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google Groups
> "Warp" group.
> To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send an
> email to warp-em+unsubscribe@googlegroups.com.
> To view this discussion on the web visit
> https://groups.google.com/d/msgid/warp-em/90ec7c58-d2fb-4a2b-9a73-229355816682n%40googlegroups.com

> .
